title: Define Meshtastic synthetic metadata and firmware version policy
description: Why this exists: Meshtastic Apple clients may fail version checks if DeviceMetadata/firmware_version is absent, but LICHEN must not misrepresent itself as Meshtastic RF firmware. What needs to be done: define synthetic metadata, min app version, hw model/capability fields, and user-visible naming for LICHEN compatibility mode. Acceptance criteria: policy passes Apple/Android/Python discovery expectations, clearly labels LICHEN compatibility, and documents fields that are synthetic or unsupported.
